result.stdout:
Usage: wargs [options] [--] <command> [args...]

Read items from stdin and execute a command for each one.

Options:
  --ndjson              Streaming NDJSON per job to stderr
  -0, --null            Null-delimited input
  --compat              POSIX whitespace splitting with quote handling
  --fail-fast           Stop spawning after first failure
  -k, --keep-order      Print output in input order
  --line-buffered       Children inherit stdio directly
  -p, --confirm         Prompt before each job
  --dry-run             Print commands without executing
  -v, --verbose         Print each command to stderr before running
  --no-shell-fallback   Disable shell fallback for builtins (cmd /c, sh -c)
  -P, --parallel N      Max concurrent jobs (default 1, 0 = unlimited)
  -n, --batch N         Items per invocation (default 1)
  -d, --delimiter CHAR  Custom input delimiter
  -h, --help            Show help
  --version             Show version
  --color               Force colored output
  --no-color            Disable colored output
  --json                JSON output to stderr
  --describe            Structured JSON metadata for AI agents

Exit Codes:
  0    All jobs succeeded
  123  One or more child processes failed
  124  Aborted due to --fail-fast
  125  Usage error
  126  Command not executable
  127  Command not found
